message:
web: Add permalink support for user messages in transcript view

- Add permalink button on user messages (appears on hover, top-right)
- Clicking sidebar prompts or permalink button updates URL hash
- Permalinked messages show a subtle ring border
- Border clears on user scroll
- Sidebar now uses text truncation instead of mask gradient
- Sidebar width increased to 25%

🔮 View transcript: https://agentlogs.ai/s/qodq1817vjk8mbnp274cdskv
